creator: ale@FreeBSD.org
text:
Bryan Drewery ha scritto:

> I think it makes perfect sense that if bsd.php.mk is provding
> PHP_VERSION and PHP_SAPI, they should be properly provided in all cases.
> Otherwise they are not safe to use in port Makefiles.

Exaclty, you shouldn't use PHP_VERSION in port Makefiles. All you can
use is PHP_VER.

> OTOH, only
> devel/ioncube and sysutils/pear-I18Nv2 are currently using PHP_VERSION.

pear-I18Nv2 could remove the use of PHP_VERSION, so the only one
remaining is ioncube, that should use PHP_VER or alternatively set a
build-dependency on php.

-- 
Alex Dupre
